Category: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Query EventId: 20504 SpanId: 97177c08600256ce TraceId: 43a450997152e02e417162418c0e63b2 ParentId: 0000000000000000 RequestId: 400004a8-0005-f600-b63f-84710c7967bb RequestPath: /api/courses/71a4833c-c177-43f6-8b1d-267ff7b0adbc ActionId: 539709df-adc3-4f9a-b712-6b4694bc1bfc ActionName: CodeStackLMS.API.Controllers.CourseController.GetCourseDetail (CodeStackLMS.API)
Compiling a query which loads related collections for more than one collection navigation, either via 'Include' or through projection, but no 'QuerySplittingBehavior' has been configured. By default, Entity Framework will use 'QuerySplittingBehavior.SingleQuery', which can potentially result in slow query performance. See https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2134277 for more information. To identify the query that's triggering this warning call 'ConfigureWarnings(w => w.Throw(RelationalEventId.MultipleCollectionIncludeWarning))'.
